title: New captions
wikitext:
[]: New captions             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Jan 12, 2015 12:35 pm From 2004 to 2008 there was a thread where people offered captions reinterpreting scenes from the show, or fan pictures, in, well, whatever way they fancied, really. It got locked, but I don't know why - I've seen this work well on other forums. I reckon that seven years on, we could do it a bit more, as a distraction from getting too worried about the final film! It's not a contest; just offer something that amuses you! But reuse previous images if you think you can do better. I'll start the ball rolling, with nothing special - just to get the more imaginative to come out of the woodwork: Are you sure , Shinji, that if I eat a slice of a melon Kaji grew I'll become more attractive to him?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Jan 12, 2015 12:57 pm ^ That image is so wrong that it's hilarious! Asuka in a Number Six-style red dress, topless Shinji?! " "Evangelion: Baywatch!", coming on January 1, 2016, the day the world ends! " You got the idea from my image in the pictures thread, I presume? The old caption contest thread was locked by request because it became too large. I really don't remember why it wasn't restarted...and man, 2008 was loooong ago!

[]:             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Mon Jan 12, 2015 2:01 pm Oh, so a CAPTION THIS thread? pwhodges, you're speaking my language. Huh, so this is what the beginning of Komm Susser Tom in End of Evangelion would be like if it was a romantic comedy.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Jan 12, 2015 2:13 pm S: "Limes and grain alcohol for breakfast?" A: "[s:1tgjk71s]Misato[/s:1tgjk71s] Mari calls it '7up!'" Edited for (very slightly) better joke.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Jan 12, 2015 2:16 pm UrsusArctos wrote: You got the idea from my image in the pictures thread, I presume?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Jan 12, 2015 2:54 pm Good choice. Well, I happen to know of an image that is even further out there. Behold this madness! (Spoilered for insanity - and if you want to know where it came from, click on the "WAAAAAAAAGH" in my signature) SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Atropos » Mon Jan 12, 2015 3:14 pm I will flay the red one alive and wear her skin as clothing. I will thus augment my swiftness.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Jan 12, 2015 5:13 pm IIRC, the old caption contest thread was locked because it eventually became a spamfest. However, our forum culture has evolved quite a bit since then, so I'm trusting that we'll be able to enjoy this privilege again responsibly.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Jan 12, 2015 5:35 pm Whatever the reason for the old lock ("locked on request"), this thread is up as a sequel - a good six years, two months, and two weeks after the old one was locked. Atropos wrote: I will flay the red one alive and wear her skin as clothing. I will thus augment my swiftness.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jan 12, 2015 6:25 pm "Ikari-kun, are you certain you don't want to become one with me?" ( ) Ahh, the memories of old school fanart...

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Jan 12, 2015 6:31 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: "Ikari-kun, are you certain you don't want to become one with me?" ( ) Ahh, the memories of old school fanart...

[]: Re: New captions             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Jan 12, 2015 8:11 pm pwhodges wrote: From 2004 to 2008 there was a thread where people offered captions reinterpreting scenes from the show, or fan pictures, in, well, whatever way they fancied, really. It got locked, but I don't know why - I've seen this work well on other forums.

[]:             Quote Post by IronEvangelion » Mon Jan 12, 2015 8:42 pm SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Jan 12, 2015 9:08 pm IronEvangelion wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Mon Jan 12, 2015 10:31 pm "Well, at least I still have my personality."

[]:             Quote Post by Atropos » Tue Jan 13, 2015 5:25 pm IronEvangelion wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Tue Jan 13, 2015 6:56 pm IronEvangelion wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Rosenakahara » Tue Jan 13, 2015 7:13 pm IronEvangelion wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Rei IV » Tue Jan 13, 2015 7:16 pm SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by IronEvangelion » Thu Jan 15, 2015 11:44 am SPOILER: Show
